metadata.description: Unique prefix for resource names (lowercase, no special chars)
CMS application secret key (for session/JWT signing)
Worker container CPU cores (Container Apps Job: up to 4.0)
Worker container memory (must be 2× CPU, e.g. 4.0→8Gi)
CMS container CPU cores (Consumption tier: 0.25–2.0 in 0.25 steps)
CMS container memory (must be 2× CPU, e.g. 0.5→1Gi, 1.0→2Gi, 2.0→4Gi)
Object ID of the Azure AD user/principal for Key Vault admin access
